mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_user_action_event ( user_id, username, role, module, method_name, method_args, action_type, description, method_result, status, exception, current_coin, current_point, happen_time ) VALUES ( #{event.userId}, #{event.username}, #{event.role}, #{event.module}, #{event.methodName}, #{event.methodArgs, typeHandler=com.backstage.common.utils.json.JsonTypeHandler}, #{event.actionType}, #{event.description}, #{event.methodResult, typeHandler=com.backstage.common.utils.json.JsonTypeHandler}, #{event.status}, #{event.exception}, #{event.currentCoin}, #{event.currentPoint}, #{event.happenTime} )
